missables: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XV — ground item on the ground across from O'aka in the mid-woods safe area; easy to walk straight past.
Jecht Sphere #9 — dropped by Spherimorph after the boss fight; examine it immediately to unlock Auron's Overdrive: Shooting Star. Cannot be skipped but easy to ignore the prompt.
Kimahri Lancet — use Lancet on a Chimera here to learn Aqua Breath (primary opportunity; Chimeras appear throughout the woods).
Clasko / Friend Sphere — suggest chocobo breeding to Clasko on this visit to unlock a Friend Sphere reward later in the game.
sgTip: Get Haste on Tidus before the Crawler fight in Lake Macalania — it transforms the fight. Use Lv. 1 Key Spheres to unlock the node if needed.

subLocations.name: Macalania Woods
subLocations.prose: Enter the woods up the sharp incline and immediately check behind the tree trunk on the left to find a hidden Sleepy Cait Sith. The path branches frequently — watch every corner for treasure chests. Two dangerous enemy types patrol these woods: Chimeras are powerful and can chain elemental attacks, so open with Auron's Power Break to cut their damage; more importantly, use Kimahri's Lancet on any Chimera to steal the Aqua Breath ability — this is your primary window to get it. Xiphos enemies can inflict Darkness, so keep Eye Drops or a White Mage casting Esuna ready. Wasp enemies can Poison party members; stock Antidotes. Ice Flan and Snow Flan absorb Ice — use Lulu's Fire spells or physical attacks only. O'aka is set up mid-woods near the Save Sphere. Examine his shop without buying anything and when he asks if his prices are too steep, agree — he gives a major discount on all items. Al Bhed Primer Vol. XV is on the ground directly across from O'aka; it blends into the path so look carefully. The woods exit leads to a clearing with the Spherimorph boss fight, after which the party reaches the Lake Macalania Travel Agency where Clasko and Al Bhed Primer Vol. XVI are waiting.

items.name: Sleepy Cait Sith
items.note: Hidden behind tree trunk in middle of south S-bend

items.name: 2,000 Gil
items.note: Chest near north exit of south area

items.name: Phoenix Down
items.note: Chest hidden behind tree before spiral down (central area)

items.name: Remedy
items.note: Chest hidden behind tree on west side (north area)

subLocations.name: Butterfly Mini-Game
subLocations.prose: A color-shifting butterfly in the clearing triggers the mini-game when approached. The rules are simple but the timer is tight: touch all 7 blue butterflies before time runs out. Each blue butterfly you tag causes a phantom chest to drop; collecting all 7 spawns the real reward chest. Avoid red butterflies entirely — touching one triggers a random fiend battle that eats precious seconds. If you fail or run out of time, leave the immediate clearing area and return to reset the chase. Completing Area 1 (reward: MP Sphere) reveals a second color-shifting butterfly deeper in the woods for Area 2 (reward: Ether). The mini-game has two additional tiers with better prizes: return after defeating Spherimorph to play harder versions for Elixirs and Megalixirs; return after obtaining the airship for a Teleport Sphere and the Saturn Sigil (Lulu's Celestial Weapon component). The Saturn Sigil cannot be obtained on this first visit.

items.name: MP Sphere
items.note: Butterfly chase Area 1 reward (7 blue butterflies)

subLocations.name: Lake Macalania Agency Front
subLocations.prose: After Spherimorph, the party reaches the Travel Agency outside Lake Macalania. Clasko is here — suggest chocobo breeding to him now to unlock a Friend Sphere reward later. A chest with 4,000 Gil sits nearby but Clasko blocks it until events progress. Al Bhed Primer Vol. XVI is on the ground by the agency entrance. Save before heading inside — the road ahead leads straight to another boss fight with no turning back.

items.name: 4,000 Gil
items.note: Chest at Agency front — Clasko blocks it initially; obtainable after he moves

subLocations.name: Spherimorph (Boss Drop)
subLocations.prose: After defeating Spherimorph in the southern clearing of Macalania Woods, it leaves behind Jecht's Sphere #9 — the ninth in the series of Jecht Spheres that document Jecht's journey across Spira. Examine the sphere immediately after the battle to trigger a cutscene in which Auron unlocks his first Overdrive: Shooting Star. This is a story-mandatory location but easy to skip the examination prompt in the post-battle rush. The sphere is found in the southern woods area, making it the only Jecht Sphere obtainable during this chapter.

items.name: Jecht's Sphere (Macalania Woods)
items.note: Dropped by Spherimorph — examine it to unlock Auron's Overdrive: Shooting Star

bosses.strategy: Spherimorph counterattacks every spell you cast with the same element it currently embodies — hitting its weakness shifts it to a new random element. Watch what spell it casts on its turn: that spell reveals its current element, meaning you need to hit the opposite. For example, if it casts Fire, attack with Blizzard; if it casts Water, attack with Thunder. Equip non-elemental weapons on your physical fighters to avoid accidentally healing it — their job is just to deal damage and bait out its counterattack spell to identify the current element. Each time you hit the weakness it shifts, so don't expect to chain the same element twice.
